creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Alex Deiter <alex.deiter@gmail.com> -----

From: Alex Deiter <alex.deiter@gmail.com>
To: FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: ports/142109: [PATCH] www/p5-MojoMojo: update to 0.999042

Hi,

Yes of course. New patch attached.

Thanks a lot!

--- www/p5-MojoMojo/Makefile.orig	2009-12-26 02:22:01.033022851 +0300
+++ www/p5-MojoMojo/Makefile	2009-12-29 07:27:08.519083014 +0300
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	MojoMojo
-PORTVERSION=	0.999027
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.999042
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	../by-authors/id/M/MR/MRAMBERG
@@ -16,75 +15,81 @@
 MAINTAINER=	perl@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	A Catalyst & DBIx::Class powered Wiki
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	\

-	Text::Textile2.3

-post-extract:
-	@${PERL} -i -ne 'print unless m,^feature,' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.PL
+	Text::Wikispaces2Markdown.3
 
-OPTIONS=	DEPLOY "Automatic database deployment" Off \
-		MARKDOWN "Markdown Formatter" Off
+OPTIONS=	DEPLOY "Create new database" Off \
+		FAST_CGI "FastCGI support" Off \
+		HTML_TOC "Table of Contents generator" Off \
+		RECAPTCHA "reCAPTCHA for anonymous edits" Off \
+		SYNTAX_HIGHLIGHT "Syntax highlighter" Off \
+		RSS_FORMATTER "RSS formatter" Off \
+		DOCBOOK_FORMATTER "DocBook formatter" Off \
+		POD_FORMATTER "POD formatter" Off \
+		TRANSCLUSION "Transclusion support" Off \
+		AMAZON "Amazon boxes" Off \
+		EMOTICONS_MSN "Emoticons MSN" Off
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if defined(WITH_DEPLOY)
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-SQL-Translator>=0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-SQL-Translator
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-SQL-Translator>=0.09006:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-SQL-Translator
+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_FAST_CGI)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-FCGI-ProcManager>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-FCGI-ProcManager
+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_HTML_TOC)

+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_RECAPTCHA)

+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_SYNTAX_HIGHLIGHT)

+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_RSS_FORMATTER)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-XML-Feed>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Feed
+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_DOCBOOK_FORMATTER)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-XML-LibXSLT>=1.66:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXSLT
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-XML-LibXML>=1.66:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML
+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_POD_FORMATTER)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Pod-Simple>=3.01:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Pod-Simple
+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_TRANSCLUSION)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-URI-Fetch>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-URI-Fetch
+.endif
+.if defined(WITH_AMAZON)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Net-Amazon>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-Amazon
 .endif
-.if defined(WITH_MARKDOWN)
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Text-Markdown>=1.0.17:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Text-Markdown
+.if defined(WITH_EMOTICONS_MSN)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Text-Emoticon-MSN
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>
